phrases.english: I want to learn Arabic because it is the language of the Quran.
phrases.arabic: أريد أن أتعلم العربية لأنها لغة القرآن.
phrases.pronunciation: Ureed an ata'allam al-'arabiyya li'annaha lughat al-Qur'an.
phrases.context: To state your primary motivation for learning Arabic.

phrases.english: I am motivated to practice speaking with native speakers.
phrases.arabic: أنا متحمس لممارسة التحدث مع الناطقين بها.
phrases.pronunciation: Ana mutahammis limumarasat at-tahadduth ma'a an-natiqeen biha.
phrases.context: To express your eagerness to engage in conversation.

phrases.english: This is a great opportunity to improve my Arabic skills.
phrases.arabic: هذه فرصة رائعة لتحسين مهاراتي في اللغة العربية.
phrases.pronunciation: Hadhihi fursa raa'i'a litahseen maharati fil-lugha al-'arabiyya.
phrases.context: To acknowledge a beneficial situation for language development.

phrases.english: I am determined to become fluent in Arabic.
phrases.arabic: أنا مصمم على أن أصبح طليقًا في اللغة العربية.
phrases.pronunciation: Ana musammam 'ala an usbih taliiqan fil-lugha al-'arabiyya.
phrases.context: To declare your strong resolve to achieve fluency.

phrases.english: I find learning Arabic very rewarding.
phrases.arabic: أجد تعلم اللغة العربية مجزيًا للغاية.
phrases.pronunciation: Ajid ta'allum al-lugha al-'arabiyya mujziyan lil-ghaya.
phrases.context: To share your positive feelings about the learning process.
